body.notes: Participation in IETF meetings constitutes agreement to the Note Well, which permits recording, transcription, and public archival of proceedings. See also BCP 78 (RFC 5378) and BCP 79 (RFC 8179) for IPR policies.

body.title: Applying BGP-LS Segment Routing Extensions to BGP-LS SPF
Usage and Applicability of BGP Link-State Shortest Path Routing (BGP-SPF) in Data Centers
Proposed Update to BGP Link-State SPF NLRI Selection Rules
02-Proposed Update to BGP-LS SPF NLRI Selection Rules
03-Applying BGP-LS Segment Routing Extensions to BGP-LS SPF
